items.name: telegraf
items.description: Agent for collecting, processing, aggregating, and writing metrics, logs, and other arbitrary data.

descriptions.zh: 用于收集、处理、聚合和写入指标、日志和其他任意数据的代理。
descriptions.en: Agent for collecting, processing, aggregating, and writing metrics, logs, and other arbitrary data.
